patch.value: pm context --fields: per-row field projection for focus items (GH-156 follow-up to --depth full)

Split from pm-j0vc. --depth full ships in the context-projection PR; --fields row-level projection (project high_level/low_level focus rows to a chosen field subset, like pm list --fields) is deferred as a focused follow-up because it requires reshaping ContextResult focus-row types and markdown rendering. --section already covers section-level customization.
